entity.name: Bad Wolf Ghost Tours
entity.description: San Antonio's #1 ranked ghost tour operator — paranormal walking tours, haunted pub crawls, and haunted dinner experiences since 2016.

read.grounding: Bad Wolf Ghost Tours is San Antonio's leading paranormal tourism company, operating ghost walks, haunted pub crawls, haunted dinner tours, tarot readings, and aura photography at 507 East Houston Street. TripAdvisor Travelers' Choice 2020. Serving downtown San Antonio, the Alamo, and River Walk.
